zh.lifeSummary: 當RALPH Pipard , 1st Lord Pipard於1244年出生在英國奧可福爾時，他的父親Ralph FitzNicholas19歲，母親Alice Pipard29歲。他於1276年6月22日與Sibyl在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1303年6月20日在英國英格蘭維爾爾享年59歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当RALPH Pipard , 1st Lord Pipard于1244年出生在英国奧可福爾时，他的父亲Ralph FitzNicholas19岁，母亲Alice Pipard29岁。他于1276年6月22日与Sibyl在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1303年6月20日在英国英格兰維爾爾享年59岁。

nameMeanings.name: Pipard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Marcel, Normand, Emile, Antoine, Cecile, Jean-Paul, Renald, Adrien, Aime, Andre, Aurel.
nickname from Old French pinard, a small medieval coin, so named from pin ‘pine’ because it bore the device of a pine cone.

nameMeanings.name: RALPH
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When RALPH Pipard , 1st Lord Pipard was born in 1244, in Oxfordshire, England, his father, Ralph FitzNicholas, was 19 and his mother, Alice Pipard, was 29. He married Sibyl on 22 June 1276, in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died on 20 June 1303, in Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque RALPH Pipard , 1st Lord Pipard est né en 1244, à Oxfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Ralph FitzNicholas, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Alice Pipard, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Sibyl le 22 juin 1276, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé le 20 juin 1303, à Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 59 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als RALPH Pipard , 1st Lord Pipard 1244 in Oxfordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ralph FitzNicholas 19 und seine Mutter Alice Pipard 29. Er hat am 22. Juni 1276 in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom Sibyl geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb am 20. Juni 1303 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando RALPH Pipard , 1st Lord Pipard è nato il nel 1244 nel Oxfordshire, England, il suo padre, Ralph FitzNicholas, aveva 19 anni e il suo madre, Alice Pipard, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Sibyl il 22 giugno 1276, nel Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì il 20 giugno 1303, nel Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 59 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: RALPH Pipard , 1st Lord Pipardが1244年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父Ralph FitzNicholasは19歳，母Alice Pipardは29歳であった。1276年6月22日にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアでSibylと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1303年6月20日にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアで59歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: RALPH Pipard , 1st Lord Pipard(이)가 1244년 영국 스퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph FitzNicholas(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Pipard(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1276년 6월 22일 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르에서 Sibyl(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1303년 6월 20일 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Sydenham, Thame, Oxfordshire, England: Sydenham, Oxenaford, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando RALPH Pipard , 1st Lord Pipard nasceu em 1244, em Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Ralph FitzNicholas, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Alice Pipard, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Sibyl em 22 de junho de 1276, em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 20 de junho de 1303, em Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 59 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда RALPH Pipard , 1st Lord Pipard родился в 1244 г. в местности оксфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Ralph FitzNicholas было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Pipard, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Sibyl 22 июня 1276 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер 20 июня 1303 г. в местности уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 59 лет.

sm.1280-1287 (age 28-30 1310): mai le 1280 e o'o I le 1287

es.lifeSummary: Cuando RALPH Pipard , 1st Lord Pipard nació en 1244, en Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Ralph FitzNicholas, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Alice Pipard, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Sibyl el 22 de junio de 1276, en Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió el 20 de junio de 1303, en Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 59 años.
